description: Per-ticker Google search interest velocity. Direct API (no pytrends/pandas). Heavy rate-limited (8s/req). Outputs to data/ticker-trends.json; emits ticker_trends.spike events for velocity >= 3.0. Complementary to justhodl-google-trends which tracks macro indices.

schedule.description: Per-ticker Google trends — 2x daily 13/21 UTC (after forward-orders + rotation-chain so future-intel has all 4 signals)
